backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor for the Luxyle backend, defining types and logic for feedback (submit/approve/reject), appointments, blocked dates, user profiles, and admin authentication with role-based access control via MixinAuthorization.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping two implemented features — admin login with feedback management and approved-only reviews display — to their relevant source files, components, and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: A JSON document containing short summaries of each frontend source file, describing the purpose and key details of components, pages, hooks, and config files in the Luxyle React app.
frontend/index.css: Base Tailwind CSS entry file defining OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark themes, covering background, foreground, card, border, chart, and sidebar color tokens.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML shell for the Luxyle React app, setting the page title and mounting the React root via the main.tsx module script.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that configures TanStack Router with a shared Layout (Header/Footer/Toaster) and three routes: home (/), contact (/contact), and admin (/admin).
frontend/src/components/AboutSection.tsx: Renders the 'About Luxyle' section with a brand story paragraph and three brand pillars (Curated Excellence, Timeless Design, Personal Touch) in a responsive grid with gold ornamental dividers.
frontend/src/components/AccessDeniedScre: Displays a centered access-denied message with a shield icon and a 'Return Home' link for users who lack admin permissions.
frontend/src/components/AdminLoginForm.t: Admin login form component with username/password fields, show/hide password toggle, loading state, and error display; calls useAdminLogin mutation and invokes onSuccess callback on successful authentication.
frontend/src/components/AppointmentBooki: A form component that lets users book showroom appointments by selecting a date, time slot, and entering contact details, with blocked-date validation and a success confirmation screen.
frontend/src/components/CollectionGaller: Displays a responsive grid of luxury interior décor images with hover overlays and a fullscreen lightbox viewer.
frontend/src/components/FeedbackForm.tsx: A review submission form with a star rating picker, name, and text fields that posts feedback via a mutation hook and shows a thank-you confirmation on success.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Site footer with brand info, Instagram link, quick navigation links with smooth-scroll support, and a store address with a Google Maps directions link.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Fixed top navigation header with scroll-aware styling, desktop nav links, smooth-scroll anchor handling, Instagram icon, and a collapsible mobile menu.
frontend/src/components/ReviewsSection.t: Renders a reviews section combining backend-approved feedback and hardcoded seed reviews in a responsive grid, with loading skeletons while data is fetched.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor (anonymous or authenticated) using React Query, and invalidates dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an Internet Identity authentication context and provider, exposing login/logout functions, identity state, and login status via a React context hook.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines all React Query hooks and mutations for admin auth (session storage), feedback CRUD (approve/reject/reset), appointments, and blocked dates against the ICP backend actor.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet importing luxury fonts (Cormorant Garamond, Jost) and defining Tailwind CSS custom properties for a beige/ivory/gold luxury color palette in both light and dark modes.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/pages/AdminDashboard.tsx: Admin dashboard page with login gate, displaying tabbed views for managing feedback (approve/reject/reset) and appointments, with blocked-date management functionality.
frontend/src/pages/ContactPage.tsx: Renders the Contact Us page with business location, hours, Instagram link, Google Maps embed, and a client-side contact form with toast notifications.
frontend/src/pages/HomePage.tsx: Composes the main landing page with a hero section, featured image preview, and imported sections for About, Collection Gallery, Reviews, Feedback Form, and Appointment Booking.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Provides utility functions to read URL query parameters (supporting both standard and hash-based routing), persist them in sessionStorage, and clean sensitive params from the URL hash.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining a luxury design system with custom color tokens (gold, ivory, cream, royal-blue), serif/sans font families, box shadows, and plugins for typography, container queries, and animations.
project_state.json: Tracks the Luxyle project's architecture, existing features (admin feedback approval, approved-only reviews display), and pending feature requests around admin authentication and feedback status persistence.
